name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE New Bucket Bag
Louise is crafted from smooth, lustrous calfskin to create a sleek, fluid bucket silhouette. A deep background highlights the exquisite, shiny gold Triomphe triumph logo, presenting a relaxed and casual temperament. The bag features a handle and a detachable shoulder strap, with very impressive capacity. Completely stress-free for daily commuting, business trips, and office work 🤎
Model: 116613
Color: Brown
Dimensions: 28x24x16
(with original packaging)
